name: static-routing-ipv4
description: Two routers with two links (primary + backup), built to demonstrate every IPv4 static route type on Cisco IOS: next-hop, default, and a floating static route that fails over to the backup link when the primary is shut. Base for the static routing article.

nodes.name: R1
nodes.extra: primary + floating(AD 200) static to 192.168.2.0/24, default route
